title: Reference leak in C implementation of `__round__` on `ObjectProxy`
author: GrahamDumpleton
body:
## Summary

The C implementation of `WraptObjectProxy_round` in `src/wrapt/_wrappers.c` leaks one reference to `builtins.round` on every call to `round()` on an `ObjectProxy`.

After fetching `round` via `PyObject_GetAttrString` (which returns a new reference), the code performs an additional `Py_INCREF(round)` that is never balanced by a matching `Py_DECREF`.

## Credits

Thanks to @devdanzin for the report via:

* https://gist.github.com/devdanzin/e1ac0c43dc4d4278ee82455da4859872
